translations.### [遊記] 9/11 名古屋一日快閃自由行\n\n: ### [Travelogue] 9/11 Nagoya One-Day Flash Trip Free Travel
translations.### 此行目的：搜集三大名城之一的名古屋城：\n\n: ### Purpose of this trip: To visit Nagoya Castle, one of the three major castles:
translations.#### 9/10 PM 10:55 — 抵達 第一航廈出境大廳\n\n: #### 9/10 PM 10:55 — Arrived at Terminal 1 Departure Hall
translations.#### 9/10 PM 22:03 — 抵達 機捷 A1 台北車站，搭乘 22: #### 9/10 PM 22:03 — Arrived at Taoyuan Airport MRT A1 Taipei Main Station, took the 22:15 express train to Terminal 1

translations.- Here, I filled in the stay duration as: - Here, I filled in the stay duration as 1 day and entered Nagoya Chubu Centrair International Airport for the contact information in Japan. I wasn't asked any questions and passed through security smoothly!

- Return: NGO 23:15 -> TPE 01:25

translations.23:15 飛機才飛，還有好長好長一段時間。\n\n: 23:15 The plane takes off, and there is still a long, long time ahead.
translations.8 點開門，一大清早完全沒人，附近的大須商店街也沒有該使營業。\n\n: The doors open at 8 o'clock, and early in the morning there is no one around. The nearby Osu Shopping Street is also not open yet.
translations.9/11 開始，正式倒數 24 小時！\n\n: Starting from 9/11, the official 24-hour countdown begins!
translations.> Back to United Airlines' strict carry-: > Back to United Airlines' strict carry-on baggage check: before boarding, they verify if you have only two pieces. If not, you must reduce to two pieces on the spot or pay an extra fee.
translations.> If I had to choose again, I would pay: > If I had to choose again, I would pay a few hundred more to get a window seat; first, it’s easier to sleep with something to lean your head on, and second, you can see the sunrise from the window when arriving in Japan in the morning!

translations.NGO 機場有很多東西可以逛，除了裡面吃的喝的跟伴手禮，還有一個很大的觀景平台可: NGO Airport has many things to explore. Besides food, drinks, and souvenirs, there is a large observation deck where you can watch planes take off and land up close! (Terminal 1)

translations.一張是座位資訊一張是進出票(投入機器用)\n\n: One is the seat information, and the other is the boarding pass (to be inserted into the machine).
translations.一日名古屋來回機票是樂桃航空推出的活動：\n\n: The one-day round-trip ticket to Nagoya is a promotion by Peach Aviation:
translations.一日快閃是一場體力與精神的考驗；本來計劃候機或在機上睡，但是候機時間太早沒睡意，: A one-day flash trip is a test of both physical and mental endurance. I planned to rest while waiting for the flight or on the plane, but the waiting time was too early to feel sleepy. On the plane, the seat was too small, I didn’t get a window seat, and the engine noise was loud, so I didn’t really sleep. This meant I was basically sleepless all night. After landing at 6:00 AM, I started the Nagoya itinerary right away. I was so tired that I ended up napping for over half an hour in a quiet, nearly empty café at Nagoya Tower around noon.
translations.一路往大須觀音方向走，快到大須觀音前有另一家 [史場的分店](https://m: Walk straight towards Osu Kannon. Just before reaching Osu Kannon, there is another branch of [Shiba](https://maps.app.goo.gl/HaHhChfzKLmvZaoBA){:target="_blank"}. Enter and dine there.
translations.不得不說台灣交通很不方便，紅眼班機到桃園機場；就只能搭可怕的一口價計程車或很貴的: I have to say Taiwan's transportation is quite inconvenient. Taking a red-eye flight to Taoyuan Airport means you can only take the expensive flat-rate taxi or a costly Uber back to Taipei. If you want to use public transport, you have to wait for the bus at 4–5 a.m.
translations.不過如果要省錢跟方便，其實現場買準急或是直接進站搭普通車就可以了；附上列車時刻表: However, if you want to save money and be convenient, you can buy the Limited Express ticket on site or just board the local train directly; below is the train timetable and stops, or you can check directly on the [Meitetsu website](https://trainbus.meitetsu.co.jp/meitetsu-transfer-zh-tw/pc/map/Top){:target="_blank"}:
translations.但很幸運分配到靠窗的位置，能好好睡一波了。\n\n: But luckily, I got a window seat, so I could get some good sleep.
translations.位子超小，在走道邊沒有頭的依靠，還好有帶頸枕加減有些支撐，但一路上引擎的轟鳴聲＋: The seat was very small, and being on the aisle meant no headrest support. Fortunately, I brought a neck pillow which helped a bit, but the engine noise plus neck soreness meant I barely slept. The flight felt long with no in-flight screen showing the distance, and we bumped all the way to Nagoya.
translations.來的太早，報到櫃檯 23:55 才開放（雖然沒有托運但不知道為什麼無法使用網路報: Arrived too early; the check-in counter opens at 23:55. (Although there was no checked luggage, online check-in was unavailable for some reason, so I still had to wait for the counter to open.)
translations.來的真的太早了，候機室沒什麼人；椅子是兩個兩個一組，很難躺著睡(很醜，我拍完照就: Arrived way too early, and the waiting area was almost empty; the seats come in pairs, making it hard to lie down and sleep (they look ugly, so I got up after taking photos). Sleeping on my back was uncomfortable, and the air conditioning was very cold. However, I still felt fairly alert with no strong urge to sleep. As time passed, more people arrived, and the noise level increased, making it even harder to rest. So, I just closed my eyes to relax and conserve energy while reviewing basic Japanese (hiragana and katakana), planning to sleep on the plane.
translations.值得一提的是，第一航廈有免費開放的休息區貴賓室，只要照個往貴賓室的指標走就會到了: It is worth mentioning that Terminal 1 has a free lounge area open to the public. Just follow the signs to the lounge; the environment and seating are similar to a café. There is also a shower room (open from 6 AM to 10 PM). For more details, refer to [this article](https://stancy.tw/airport-lounge/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.先買名古屋有名的手羽先嚐嚐。\n\n: First, buy Nagoya's famous Tebasaki to try.
translations.再去商店街的藥妝簡單採購了一些可以帶上飛機的藥品帶回去台灣。\n\n: Then I made a quick purchase of some medications allowed on the plane at the shopping street's drugstore to bring back to Taiwan.
translations.再逛一次大須商店街，走回名城線，前往熱田神宮。\n\n: Stroll through Osu Shopping Street again, then take the Meijo Line back to Atsuta Shrine.
translations.出車站發現外面正下起大雨，我沒料到日本會下雨，沒帶雨傘；附近很空曠沒看到超商，最: Exiting the station, I found it was raining heavily. I didn't expect rain in Japan and didn't bring an umbrella. The area nearby was quite open with no convenience stores in sight. Finally, I found a FamilyMart in the underground passage at Nagoya Castle Station, B1 level, across from Nagoya City Hall, bought an umbrella, and continued to Nagoya Castle!
translations.可以 +幾百塊 選靠窗的位置、準備頸枕、耳塞比較好睡。\n\n: You can pay a few hundred more to choose a window seat and bring a neck pillow and earplugs for better sleep.
translations.可能是一大早＋不需要提領行李，從飛機落地到入境只花不到 15 分鐘；但是天空不作: It was early morning and without the need to collect luggage, it took less than 15 minutes from landing to immigration; however, the weather was unfavorable, and it was raining heavily in Nagoya.
translations.吃飽出發後，約莫 9:02 抵達名古屋城站。\n\n: After eating, I arrived at Nagoya Castle Station around 9:02.
translations.吃飽繼續候機…等待櫃檯開放(20:45 開放)。\n\n: After eating, continue waiting at the gate... waiting for the counter to open (opens at 20:45).
translations.名古屋城 9:00 開，其他景點沒那麼早開、從 上前津車站 去也順路很近，因此先: Nagoya Castle opens at 9:00 AM. Other attractions open later, and since it's convenient and close from Kamimaezu Station, we visited Nagoya Castle first.
translations.名城線熱田神宮站出來，要再走一段才會到熱田神宮參拜正門。\n\n: After exiting Meijo Line Atsuta Jingu Station, you need to walk a bit further to reach the main entrance of Atsuta Shrine.
translations.味道不錯，但不小心點成雙主食…他的豬排是豬排飯ＸＤ\n\n: The taste was good, but I accidentally ordered two main dishes... His pork cutlet came with rice XD
translations.咖啡廳視野，時間接近 10:30 開始睏意來襲；在這邊趴著睡到 11 點多才離開: The cafe view, around 10:30, sleepiness started to hit; I rested my head here and slept until after 11 before leaving. There were many seats, few people, and it was very quiet... perfect for a nap.
translations.咖啡是必須的，畢竟整晚沒睡；炸蝦吐司的蝦是真的整之下去切成的，吃得到蝦肉的 Q: Coffee is a must, especially after a sleepless night; the shrimp in the fried shrimp toast is truly whole shrimp chopped up, giving a chewy texture.
translations.回到聯航手提行李檢查嚴格的部分，上機前會再檢查是不是只有兩件，不是的話會要你現場: Back to United Airlines' strict carry-on baggage check: before boarding, they will check if you have only two pieces. If not, you must reduce to two pieces on the spot or pay an extra fee.
translations.回台灣大約凌晨 2–3 點，沒有公共交通，只能搭計程車回台北。\n\n: Returning to Taiwan around 2–3 AM, there is no public transportation available, so you can only take a taxi back to Taipei.
translations.因為下雨外面的位子沒開放，裡面的位子爆滿，就沒有買一杯咖啡坐下來休息觀景了；拍了: Because it was raining, the outdoor seats were closed, and the indoor seats were full, so I didn't buy a coffee to sit and relax while enjoying the view. After taking some photos, I started walking down to explore Takashimaya Department Store. There is a Harbs on the lower floor, but it requires waiting in line.
translations.因為班機延誤，原本預訂 23:15，延誤到 23:50；約 00:15 才起飛。: Due to a flight delay, the original departure time of 23:15 was postponed to 23:50; the plane took off around 00:15.
translations.在休息區那邊其實比較好睡，因為可以趴著。。。但我那時候只有路過看了一眼就開始在機: The rest area was actually better for sleeping since you could lie down... but I only glanced at it and then started looking for food places in the airport (no airplane meal). As expected, it was too late and everything was closed. In the end, I only found a vending machine selling snacks, so I bought a pack of I-Mei puffs and a can of tea to take with me.
translations.在地下街逛了一圈後往 JR GATE TOWER 走，上到 [15F 的星巴克]: After walking around the underground shopping street, head to JR GATE TOWER and go up to the [Starbucks on the 15th floor](https://www.bigfang.tw/blog/post/jrgatetower-starbucks-nagoya){:target="_blank"} for free scenic views.
translations.在角落咪了一下到 20:00 多時去排隊準備出境；聯航對手提行李檢查蠻嚴格的，規: Took a short nap in the corner until after 8:00 PM, then lined up to prepare for departure; Peach Aviation is quite strict with carry-on luggage, allowing only two pieces under 7 kg each, no exceptions. I saw some people just going to buy a PS5 and come back—it seems like a great option for a one-day quick trip.
translations.報到櫃檯提早開放，我 11:40 回到出境大廳就看到開始報到了；沒有托運行李、只: The check-in counter opened early. When I returned to the departure hall at 11:40, check-in had already started. Without checked luggage and only carrying a backpack, I quickly completed check-in, security, and immigration.
translations.天氣時陰時晴，去的時候轉晴，離開的時候又轉陰。\n\n: The weather was partly cloudy and partly sunny; it cleared up when I arrived and became cloudy again when I left.
translations.對面有一個 [Sky Promenade](https://journey.tw: Across the street is the [Sky Promenade](https://journey.tw/sky-promenade/){:target="_blank"}, Nagoya's new observation deck, but due to fatigue, the need to buy another ticket, and bad weather, I didn't go. There were no other attractions of interest within the available time. In the end, I just strolled down to the underground shopping area and bought some souvenirs (Kaeru Honke). Then I purchased a one-way ticket on the Nagoya Railroad → Chubu Centrair International Airport plus the uSky train ($271) back to the airport.
translations.就在名古屋城的右下角，距離約 2 站；我走出名古屋城後搭公車前往。\n\n: Just to the bottom right of Nagoya Castle, about 2 stops away; I took a bus there after leaving Nagoya Castle.
translations.後來才知道名古屋還有 [犬山城](https://www.kkday.com/z: I later found out that Nagoya also has [Inuyama Castle](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/177762?cid=19365&ud1=9da2c51fa4f2){:target="_blank"} to visit. If I were to plan again, I would probably go to Inuyama Castle first. Also, I didn’t get to try the eel rice!
translations.怕鳥的別來，外面鴿子很多，可以買飼料餵鴿子。\n\n: If you're afraid of birds, better not come—there are many pigeons outside. You can buy feed to feed them.
translations.我只有一個包包所以可以再手提一個，就順手再買了一瓶獺祭二割三分 750 ml 回: I only have one bag, so I can carry one more by hand. I conveniently bought a bottle of Dassai 23 750 ml to bring back to Taiwan. (5,700 yen, 100 yen more expensive than in Tokyo)
translations.我是先從網路買 中部國際機場 -> 名古屋鐵道單程車票＋uSky 列車 ($27: I first bought a one-way ticket from Chubu Centrair International Airport to Nagoya on the Meitetsu Railway plus the uSky train ($271). Since I was already there, I decided to try the newest and best train; it has reserved seats, is very stable and comfortable, and is a limited express train.
translations.我那時候買名古屋一日來回含機場服務費的價格是 `$5,600` ， **無托運、: At that time, I bought a round-trip ticket to Nagoya for one day including airport service fees for `$5,600`, **no checked baggage, no meals, no seat selection**; both flights were red-eye:
translations.或先去第二航廈看免費的飛機博物館（我去的時候已經關門了）。\n\n: Or visit the free airplane museum at Terminal 2 first (it was already closed when I went).
translations.手提行李規定： **每人兩件 & 總重小於 7 公斤**\n\n: Carry-on baggage rules: **Two pieces per person & total weight under 7 kg**
translations.拍了一下 uSky 真身。\n\n: Took a quick shot of the real uSky.
translations.時間接近中午，想說吃一下名古屋有名的味噌豬排，本店距離名古屋塔約一兩站的距離，決: As it approached noon, I wanted to try Nagoya's famous miso pork cutlet. The main restaurant was about one or two stops away from Nagoya Tower, so I decided to walk.
translations.時間與景點有限，不太能去太遠。\n\n: Time and attractions are limited, so traveling too far is not feasible.
translations.時間還不到 PM 5:00 有點可惜。。。但要再去其他景點又太遠。。。又想說避開: It's not even 5:00 PM yet, which is a bit of a pity... but other attractions are too far away... so I decided to avoid the rush hour crowds.
translations.晚餐吃了機場的 [名古屋烏龍麵](https://maps.app.goo.gl: For dinner, I had [Nagoya Udon](https://maps.app.goo.gl/cnZpXBh68FjYK39Y8){:target="_blank"} at the airport. Nagoya's specialty noodles are flat.
translations.最後一個點是去名鐵逛逛(其實到這邊的時候已經很累了)。\n\n: The last stop was to visit Meitetsu (actually, I was already very tired by this point).
translations.有人點類似排骨雞麵的東西在吃，整個機艙都是香味，很邪惡。\n\n: Someone ordered something like pork rib chicken noodles, and the whole cabin was filled with the aroma. It was so tempting.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本殿維修中，只在外面逛逛就離開了。\n\n: The main hall was under renovation, so we just walked around outside and then left.
translations.樂桃航空名古屋一日快閃機票旅(ㄒㄧㄥˊ)遊(ㄐㄩㄣ)體驗\n\n: Peach Aviation Nagoya One-Day Flash Trip Experience
translations.為了加速入境一樣直接預先填寫好入境資訊，直接用 QRCode 就能完成入境手續：: To speed up immigration, fill in your entry information in advance and complete the process using a QR Code:
translations.無腦的點套餐吃，想想點錯了，主要是想吃左上角的味噌豬排，套餐是 味噌豬排+炸柳葉: Mindlessly ordered the set meal, but realized I made a mistake. I mainly wanted to try the miso pork cutlet in the top left corner. The set includes miso pork cutlet + fried willow leaf fish + simmered dish + side dish + soup + rice. The miso pork cutlet was delicious but too little to satisfy!
translations.照官方宣傳文宣， **最長停留時間 16小時45分鐘** ！\n\n: According to the official promotion, **the maximum stay time is 16 hours and 45 minutes**!
translations.生可樂好喝，在超市或販賣機看到可以買來嘗試看看；它是 Suntory 跟百事一起: Draft beer-style cola tastes great. You can try buying it at supermarkets or vending machines. It’s a product launched by Suntory and Pepsi, not available in Taiwan. Made like draft beer, it has strong carbonation and isn’t too syrupy. I usually pour out regular cola because it gets too sweet, but I can finish draft cola!
translations.睡醒研究了一下機上設施，才發現航程資訊、娛樂影片，用手機連上機上 WiFi 就能: After waking up and checking the onboard facilities, I found out that flight information and entertainment videos can be accessed by connecting your phone to the onboard WiFi. You can also order food directly using your phone.
translations.簡單參拜後，買了些御守就離開了。\n\n: After a simple visit, I bought some omamori charms and left.
translations.綠洲 21 就在名古屋塔外面，但由於下雨＋平日＋早上，所以沒什麼好逛的，去繞了一: Oasis 21 is right outside Nagoya Tower, but due to rain, a weekday, and morning time, there wasn't much to explore, so I just walked around briefly and left.
translations.要我再選的話，我會選擇 +幾百塊 選靠窗的位置；一是頭有地方靠比較好睡、二是早上: If I had to choose again, I would pay a few hundred more to get a window seat; first, it’s easier to sleep with something to lean your head on, and second, you can see the sunrise from the window when arriving in Japan in the morning!
translations.買票後可以上到觀景台鳥瞰名古屋市(如果只是要去中間層的咖啡廳不需買票，咖啡廳也能: After buying a ticket, you can go up to the observation deck to overlook Nagoya city (if you only want to visit the café on the middle level, no ticket is needed; the café also offers some views).
translations.走到的時候發現人多要排隊…時間寶貴，因也靠近大須商店街了，就再繼續走往大須商店街: When I arrived, I found a long queue... Since time was precious and I was close to Osu Shopping Street, I decided to continue walking there to find something to eat.
translations.走進名古屋城雨勢稍緩，但是天守閣尚在維修不開放，只能參觀旁邊金碧輝煌的本丸御殿。: Entering Nagoya Castle, the rain eased slightly, but the main keep was still under renovation and closed, so we could only visit the nearby splendid Honmaru Palace.
translations.路上買了 弁才天 水果大福來吃，皮薄嫩、水果新鮮汁多，一口氣買了兩個吃！(我覺得: Bought Benten Fruit Daifuku on the way. The skin is thin and soft, the fruit is fresh and juicy. I ate two at once! (I think it's tastier than Rusui-an XD)
translations.這家店出來就是大須觀音。\n\n: This shop is right next to Osu Kannon.
translations.這邊停留時間填寫 1 日，在日聯絡資訊我直接填寫 名古屋中部國際機場的資訊，沒有: Here, I filled in the stay duration as 1 day and entered Nagoya Chubu Centrair International Airport for the contact information in Japan. I wasn't asked any questions and passed through security smoothly!
translations.這邊還有 Lawson 跟扭蛋商店(但也是有營業時間)。\n\n: There is also a Lawson and a capsule toy shop here (but they have business hours).
translations.進入本丸御殿要脫鞋、寄放包包(免費，但要有 $100 日幣硬幣)。\n\n: You must take off your shoes and store your bags (free, but a 100 yen coin is required) before entering Honmaru Palace.
translations.還好因為靠窗，在機上有補眠一下；精神還算可以。\n\n: Luckily, I was by the window and managed to get some sleep on the plane; my energy was still okay.
translations.還有一小時才開放報到，索性先回 B1 美食街找位子休息；晚上 11 點的美食街所: There was still an hour before check-in opened, so I went back to the B1 food court to find a seat and rest; by 11 PM, all the food court shops were closed (including convenience stores), and there was nothing left to buy.
translations.除了人體的電量，手機的電量也是一大考驗；我是帶 20,000 毫安時的小米行動電: Besides the body's energy, the phone's battery is also a big challenge; I used a 20,000mAh Xiaomi power bank to complete the entire trip (charging my iPhone 13 about 4–5 times round trip).
translations.需要在 金山(NH34) 就下車 改搭 `名城縣` 前往 上前津車站。\n\n: You need to get off at Kinzan (NH34) and transfer to the `Meijo Line` to go to Kamimaezu Station.
translations.飛機小延誤，本來是預計 01:55 開始登機，延誤 10 分鐘；最後我在 02:: The flight was slightly delayed. Boarding was originally scheduled to start at 01:55 but was delayed by 10 minutes; I finally completed boarding at 02:15.
